title: Constraint Severity Taxonomy
description: Finite, ordered severity levels for constraint evaluation results.

severity_levels.description: Informational. Constraint evaluated with no concerns.
severity_levels.example: Material compatibility confirmed for standard substrate pairing.

severity_levels.description: Minor concern noted. Does not impede construction activity.
severity_levels.example: Manufacturer recommends but does not require primer for this substrate.

severity_levels.description: Moderate concern. Should be reviewed before proceeding.
severity_levels.example: Substrate age exceeds manufacturer recommended threshold for direct application.

severity_levels.description: Significant concern. Likely requires corrective action or human review.
severity_levels.example: Assembly method conflicts with specification for this wind zone classification.

severity_levels.description: Severe constraint violation. Must be resolved before any work proceeds.
severity_levels.example: PMMA applied directly to aged asphalt without approved separator — chemical incompatibility.

aggregation_rule: Batch evaluation returns the highest severity encountered across all evaluated constraints.
